skills.description: Practical guide for configuring and operating Local Skills MCP in real projects. Use when the user asks where to place skills (~/.claude/skills, ./.claude/skills, ./skills, or SKILLS_DIR), how precedence and overrides work, how to set up Claude Code mcp.json, or how to share and hot-reload project skills.

skills.description: Creates and improves SKILL.md skills with strong routing descriptions. Use when asked to create a new skill, rewrite a skill description with better 'Use when' trigger keywords, review or fix name/description frontmatter, build a complete SKILL.md template, or interpret validate_skill and evaluate_skill results.
